meta.siteDescription: A reading social network — reviews, posts, and your personal library.
brand.slogan: Read Deep. Plan Smart. Grow Daily.
common.readingListSubtitle: Track what you want to read, are reading, and have finished.
common.readingListRemoveMessage: Are you sure you want to remove this book from your reading list?
common.readingListRemoved: Book removed from your reading list.
common.readingListRemoveFailed: Could not remove the book from your reading list.
push.title: Push notifications
push.subtitle: Get messages, calls, and activity on this device even when Nook is closed.
push.denied: Notifications are blocked by the browser. Allow them in browser/app settings, then try again.
push.unsupported: This browser does not support push notifications.
push.iosInstall: On iPhone/iPad: open Nook in Safari, tap Share → Add to Home Screen, then enable notifications inside the installed app.
push.notConfigured: Push service is not configured on this server yet.
push.enableFailed: Could not enable notifications. Please try again.
push.nudgeBody: Enable notifications to get messages and calls when you leave the app.
push.soundsSubtitle: Message pings and call ringtones while using Nook.
messaging.title: Messages
messaging.subtitle: Private conversations with your friends on Nook.
messaging.noConversations: You do not have any conversations yet.
messaging.revokeConfirm: The message will be recalled for everyone in the conversation.
messaging.revokeExpired: The recall window for this message has expired.
messaging.deleteMessageConfirm: The message will be deleted for you only. Others can still see it.
messaging.noFriends: Add a friend before starting a conversation.
messaging.serviceUnavailable: Messaging is not ready. Check the configuration or try again later.
messaging.blockConfirm: After blocking, neither of you can send messages to the other.
messaging.microphoneRequired: Camera or microphone permission is required for calls.
messaging.cameraSwitchFailed: Couldn’t switch camera. Check access permissions.
messaging.speaker: Speaker
messaging.audioDeviceSwitchFailed: Couldn’t switch microphone. Check access permissions.
messaging.audioOutputUnavailable: Couldn’t switch to the selected speaker.
messaging.audioOutputUnsupported: This browser doesn’t support speaker selection. You can still change the microphone.
messaging.callNoAnswer: No answer. Please try again later.
messaging.callConfigUnavailable: Could not load the call server configuration. Please try again.
messaging.callTurnUnavailable: No TURN server is available; calls may fail between different networks.
messaging.callRealtimeUnavailable: The call connection was interrupted. Wait a moment and try again.
messaging.callConnectionFailed: Could not establish the call connection.
messaging.callTurnConnectionFailed: Could not connect to the TURN server. Check the TURN configuration or try another network.
messaging.editExpired: The edit window for this message has expired.
messaging.tooManyImages: You can send up to {max} photos at a time.
messaging.friendsOnly: Only friends can message each other.
messaging.deleteConversationConfirmMessa: This conversation will be removed from your inbox. New messages will bring it back.
guest.viewingAs: You are browsing as a guest
guest.viewingHint: Showing public posts (admins and public accounts). Sign in for the full experience.
auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to keep reading and writing.
auth.heroBody: Your personal books and posts — reviews, writing, and reading lists in one place.
auth.heroFooter: A magazine-style reading experience for your book community.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.accountDisabled: This account has been disabled. Contact an administrator.
auth.guestAccountError: This account is guest-only — reviews are disabled. Use a real admin/user account.
auth.signInSubtitleLong: Sign in to see your timeline and library.
auth.guestHint: View admin posts only — no comments, likes, or creating content.
auth.registerSubtitle: Join the reading and writing community.
auth.registerHeroBody: Create an account to publish reviews, share posts, and build your personal library.
auth.registerVerificationSent: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click the link in the email to activate your account.
auth.registerCheckSpam: Don't see it? Check your spam or promotions folder.
auth.verifyEmailSuccessBody: Account {username} is ready. You can sign in now.
auth.verifyEmailFailed: This confirmation link is invalid or has expired.
auth.verifyEmailMissingToken: Missing confirmation token. Open the link from your registration email.
auth.resendVerificationHint: Enter your registration email to receive a new link.
auth.resendVerificationSent: If a pending registration exists for this email, we sent a new link.
auth.resendVerificationFailed: Could not send the confirmation email.
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your account email and we'll send a link to reset your password.
auth.forgotPasswordSent: If this email belongs to an account, we've sent a password reset link. Check your inbox (and spam folder).
auth.forgotPasswordFailed: Could not send the reset link. Please try again later.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Enter a new password for your account.
auth.resetPasswordSuccessBody: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in with your new password.
auth.resetPasswordFailed: Could not reset the password. The link may have expired or be invalid.
auth.resetPasswordMissingToken: Missing reset token. Open the link from your password reset email.
landing.heroSub: Share book reviews, posts, and your personal library. Guests can read public reviews and posts; sign in to connect with friends and write your own.

friends.emptyFriendsMessage: Connect with other readers to see their reviews and posts in your feed.
friends.emptyIncoming: No new invites. When someone sends a request, you'll see it here.
friends.searchHint: Results exclude your account. Search runs automatically as you type.

friends.suggestionsIntro: Only people who share mutual friends with you. Tap a name to view their profile.

errors.requestFailed: We couldn't complete that request. Try again later.
errors.loadFailed: Couldn't load data. Try again later.

errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

errors.guestWriteBlocked: Guest mode can't do this. Sign in with your account.
errors.accountDisabled: This account has been disabled. Contact an administrator.

errors.serverBusy: The server is busy. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.deletePostFailed: Couldn't delete this post. Try again later.
errors.deleteGalleryImageFailed: Couldn't remove this image. You can still edit the title and body.
errors.createEntityFailed: Couldn't create this item. Sign in again and retry.
errors.formSessionHint: Your session expired — your form content is still here.
errors.uploadAuthFailed: Image upload was rejected by the server even though you are signed in. Sign out and sign in again; if it persists, redeploy the latest be-blog backend.
errors.apiOriginMismatch: Your sign-in environment changed. Please sign in again.

streak.keepAlive: Read or write something to keep your streak alive today!

trending.title: Trending this week
reviews.deleteConfirmMessage: This review will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
reviews.spoilerHint: Mark this when the review reveals important plot details.
reviews.draftHint: Draft — only you can see it until it is published
reviews.noPermissionEdit: You do not have permission to edit this review.
reviews.qualityGuideTitle: Turn your reaction into a useful review
reviews.qualityGuideIntro: Readers and search systems value original experience, concrete evidence, and a balanced point of view. Use these prompts as guidance, not a rigid formula.
reviews.qualityPromptExperience: What did the book change in your thinking or behavior?
reviews.qualityPromptEvidence: Support your view with a specific scene, idea, or argument.
reviews.qualityPromptAudience: Who should read it, who may not enjoy it, and why?
reviews.qualityPromptBalance: What are its strengths, limitations, and your reading context?
reviews.qualityTemplateAdded: Analysis outline added to your review.
reviews.qualityStarter: Good start — add a concrete experience
reviews.qualityTemplate:
My reading experience

[How did the book reach you? What did it change in your thinking or behavior?]

Highlights and evidence

[Describe a specific scene, idea, or argument and explain why it matters.]

What was less convincing

[Discuss limitations fairly and in context.]

Who should read this book?

[Name the readers it suits or may not suit, and explain why.]

Conclusion

[Sum up your assessment through first-hand experience instead of only retelling the book.]
